tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def prs (github_pull_requests))
(def rows
  (->> prs
       (group-by :repo)
       (map (fn [[repo xs]]
              {:repo repo
               :open (count (filter #(= "open" (:state %)) xs))
               :merged-closes-linear (count (filter #(and (= "merged" (:state %))
                                                          (:closes_linear %)) xs))}))
       (sort-b…(+20)
